info.description: Published articles displayed on the public Hyper Blog.

title.description: Clear article title. Keep it useful for readers and search engines.

slug.description: Unique URL segment. Generated from the title; edit only when needed.

excerpt.description: Short article summary used in blog cards and as a metadata fallback.

content.description: Main article content. Use headings in a logical order and write for readers first.

coverImage.description: Optional article cover image displayed on the blog index and article page.

authorName.description: Optional byline shown on the public article.

category.description: Optional topic label, for example AI Commerce or Shopify Growth.
